overall.description: A first-person walk through a suburban Los Santos neighborhood in GTA V, with downtown skyscrapers visible in the distance. The player moves along sidewalks past residential bungalows, palm trees, and occasional vehicle traffic on wet streets under overcast skies.

red sedan drives past on the right side of the street

cluster of modern glass and steel high-rise buildings visible in the distance

green hedge barrier along the property line

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a view of a suburban street with downtown skyscrapers visible in the distance. The camera walks forward along the sidewalk past a yellow bungalow house on the left. A pedestrian in a purple shirt passes by closely on the left, and a red sedan drives past on the street. Palm trees and utility poles line the street.

events.description: black SUV drives past on the right side of the street
blue sedan drives past on the right side of the street

blue sedan driving down the street

wooden mailbox on post near the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the residential sidewalk with hedge walls on the left. Two vehicles, a black SUV and a blue sedan, pass by on the street. The downtown skyscrapers shift to the right side of the frame as the path continues. A wooden mailbox appears near the sidewalk.

events.description: slight left turn at the street intersection
encountering a pedestrian walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: turning at the intersection and continuing along the sidewalk, passing other pedestrians

man in blue shirt walking along the wall

green hills and mountains visible in the background beyond the houses

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left at an intersection, revealing a stone retaining wall on the left and a blue mailbox on the right. A woman in a black dress walks toward the camera on the sidewalk, while a man in a blue shirt walks along the wall. The view shifts to show green mountains in the background as the downtown skyline disappears from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: quiet residential sidewalk with hillside backdrop

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection with stop sign marking
view opens up to show more of the mountain landscape on the left

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection and continuing along the opposite sidewalk with mountain views

continuous stone retaining wall along the sidewalk with decorative cap

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the street at an intersection, passing over a painted stop sign marking. A continuous stone wall runs along the left side of the sidewalk. The mountain hills become more prominent on the left side as the camera continues walking through the quiet residential area with no other pedestrians or vehicles visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a suburban neighborhood that shifts from a view of the distant city skyline to a focus on looming green mountains. It begins by moving along a sidewalk past a yellow bungalow and palm trees, with a pedestrian in purple and a red sedan passing by as downtown skyscrapers anchor the horizon. As the camera continues past hedge walls and a wooden mailbox, the city skyline gradually shifts to the right while a black SUV and blue sedan drive past on the street. The scene then turns left at an intersection, passing a stone retaining wall and pedestrians in black and blue attire, which causes the downtown skyline to disappear and reveal green mountains in the background. Finally, the camera crosses a painted stop sign at another intersection, moving alongside a continuous stone wall as the mountain hills become the dominant feature of the quiet residential landscape.
